name: claude-rpc-presence
description: Live Claude Code status in the status bar — what Claude is doing (working / thinking / waiting on you), session tokens, and lifetime stats, read from claude-rpc's state files. Pause or resume the Discord card without leaving the editor. Tracks Claude Code only — never your editor activity.

claudeRpc.hideWhenStale.description: Hide the status bar item entirely when Claude Code isn't running (default shows a dimmed 'Away' item).

claudeRpc.showTokens.description: Append the session's running token count to the status bar label.

claudeRpc.pollIntervalSec.description: Fallback re-read cadence in seconds. File watchers catch most changes instantly; the poll also refreshes elapsed-time displays.

claudeRpc.statusBarPriority.description: Placement weight among left-aligned status bar items — higher appears further left. The default outranks virtually every other extension's item. Applies immediately.
